message: fix(reliability): isolate bus listeners and fail closed on test selection

files.patch:
@@ -16,11 +16,11 @@
     "format": "biome format --write .",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit --project web/tsconfig.json",
     "test": "bun test",
-    "test:unit": "bun test $(bash scripts/test-unit-files.sh)",
-    "test:unit:parallel": "bash scripts/test-parallel.sh $(bash scripts/test-unit-files.sh)",
-    "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bun test $(bash scripts/test-integration-files.sh)",
-    "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bun test $(bash scripts/test-integration-files.sh)",
-    "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bun test $(bash scripts/test-integration-files.sh)",
+    "test:unit": "bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-unit-files.sh",
+    "test:unit:parallel": "bash scripts/run-tests-parallel-from-list.sh scripts/test-unit-files.sh",
+    "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
+    "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
+    "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
     "test:all": "bun test",
     "test:parallel": "bash scripts/test-parallel.sh",
     "test:watch": "bun test --watch",

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+if (( $# != 1 )); then
+	echo "Usage: $0 <list-script>" >&2
+	exit 1
+fi
+
+list_script="$1"
+list_output="$(bash "$list_script")"
+
+declare -a test_files=()
+while IFS= read -r path; do
+	if [[ -n "$path" ]]; then
+		test_files+=("$path")
+	fi
+done <<< "$list_output"
+
+if (( ${#test_files[@]} == 0 )); then
+	echo "No test files returned by $list_script" >&2
+	exit 1
+fi
+
+bun test "${test_files[@]}"

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+if (( $# != 1 )); then
+	echo "Usage: $0 <list-script>" >&2
+	exit 1
+fi
+
+list_script="$1"
+list_output="$(bash "$list_script")"
+
+declare -a test_files=()
+while IFS= read -r path; do
+	if [[ -n "$path" ]]; then
+		test_files+=("$path")
+	fi
+done <<< "$list_output"
+
+if (( ${#test_files[@]} == 0 )); then
+	echo "No test files returned by $list_script" >&2
+	exit 1
+fi
+
+bash scripts/test-parallel.sh "${test_files[@]}"
